name: Apple & Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sweet potatoes in a saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil.
2. Cook for 30 to 40 minutes or until tender. Remove from water and peel.
3. Mash the sweet potatoes.
4. Add butter, apple juice concentrate, salt, pepper, diced apple, cloves, and a dash of nutmeg.
5. Stir until well combined.
6. Transfer the mixture to an ovenproof serving dish.
7. Warm in a 350°F (175°C) oven for about 20-30 minutes before serving.
Food Exchanges per Serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD Exchange + 1/2 FRUIT Exchange
Calories: 116, Carbohydrates: 24g, Protein: 1g, Sodium: 80mg, Fat: 2g
